content:
📜 Certain players can nudge the Fate Wheel, but only within strict limits.

✔ How Fate Manipulation Works:
• Certain archetypes, items, or abilities allow players to influence the outcome.
• Manipulation never guarantees a result, but shifts probabilities.
• Example Influence Mechanisms:
• The Oracle → Can peek at the next two possible results.
• The Trickster → Can shift one result up or down by a single position.
• A Rare Item → Allows one-time total control over a spin.

✔ Counterplay Against Fate Manipulation:
• Other players can counter attempts to change fate with their own powers.
• Certain Fate Wheel results may be immune to interference.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Keeps fate unpredictable while allowing some control.
✔ Encourages player interaction and counterplay.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 525 (chunk 525/555)
